CHRPRCTIC_TXNMY_IND 
LABEL: 
Chiropractic Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the chiropractic provider category; ever in 
the calendar year.
